goal: Integrate Obsidian for local knowledge management and memory enhancement

Set up Obsidian vault structure mirroring swarm knowledge domains
Implement bidirectional sync for memory enhancement
Create templates for different types of swarm knowledge in Obsidian

Create templates for daily logs, outcomes, plans, etc.
